nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as creative or cultural participant
nodes.grounding_span: A majority of the time I use it for admin stuff

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as conceptual or generative creative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I only really reach for it when I can ask for a really granular task that don't require idea generation

nodes.label: AI for low-complexity content variation
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated content as unique and authentic
nodes.grounding_span: it might be hurting my chances because so many people probably have similar pitches

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI use preserving creative autonomy and skill
nodes.grounding_span: I think it has the potential to rope people in to a sort of dependence

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.label_negative: AI in arts as a valid creative tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI in the arts doesn't make sense to me

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I have a core aversion to that feeling of creating something yet not feeling connected to it

nodes.label: Cultural value of organic authentic art
nodes.grounding_span: organic authentic art isn't valued because it isn't as profitable as commercial slop

nodes.label: Efficiency in administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: tracking CPC on Meta Advertising campaigns or budgeting to buy new equipment

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For that stuff, it can be really helpful

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: it isn't usually that helpful and I don't love doing it

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI-generated pitches
nodes.grounding_span: It seems 'good enough', but I can't help think that it might be hurting my chances

nodes.label: Concern for artists directly impacted by AI
nodes.grounding_span: AI in the arts doesn't make sense to me

nodes.label: Experience-based boundary setting
nodes.grounding_span: It reminds me of when I used 'Splice' loops for a period of time

nodes.label: Boundary-setting between core and peripheral creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I usually bring many ideas to the table and have the LLM sort it out into a fluid text
